assumptions: The dividend has already been recognised as an intercompany receivable/payable, so it is analysed as an intragroup monetary item rather than as a forecast transaction.
The analysis is limited to consolidated financial statements under IFRS 9 hedge accounting.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognised foreign-currency intragroup dividend receivable can only be considered in consolidation through the intragroup monetary item exception in IFRS 9 paragraph 6.3.6, which aligns with a fair value hedge model for FX risk.
